chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-262 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No.2131/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 27-11-2025. Mr. Aziz Ahmed Laghari advocate for applicant. Respondent Ali Nawaz in person. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G. = Learned counsel for the applicant does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous application on the ground that in compliance of impugned order passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, F.I.R has been registered by respondent Ali Nawaz; hence instant application has become infructuous. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application alongwith listed application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE *Saleem*
